message:
test(export-pages): remove preview-port races and watch-export flakes

- move the `--agents-force` default-mode test into a deeper nested temp directory so it no longer
  accidentally discovers `/AGENTS.md` from the real machine root and fails for environment-specific
  reasons unrelated to the command under test
- wait for the first exported `index.html` before mutating or deleting the watched beads file in the
  E2E watch tests, and give the watcher more loop budget plus longer timeouts so slower machines can
  capture the initial baseline before the change arrives
- serialize the preview integration tests behind a mutex, recover cleanly from poisoned state, and
  parse the actual advertised preview port from startup stdout so tests follow the server when it has
  to auto-increment off a busy requested port
- make the request-limit test perform an explicit empty preconnect followed by two real requests,
  which preserves the intent of the regression check while avoiding hangs from stale-port assumptions
